assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.

criteria.name: Handling core objections

objections.objection: Ok. But I hear this every time.
Wait. I still don't understand how to bring this to finance.
Ok. Show me concretely: what step disappears from my day, how many hours, who handles it.
Send it. If it's concrete — I'll respond.

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.evidence_quote: Pricing model: per contractor/month, with volume tiers. There's a pilot option to test on a subset before committing. Want me to send a rough calculation? Which part of your process is eating the most time right now?
criteria.label: Clear next step
